resources.string: Your personal manga library. Track your reading, discover new series, and enjoy your favorite manga offline.
Explore thousands of manga from various sources. Search by title, genre, or popularity to find your next read.
Download chapters to read anywhere, even without internet. Your library stays with you.
Create categories, track reading progress, and get notified when new chapters are available.
Otaku Reader uses extensions to access manga sources. Install your first extension to get started!
